description: ARCH-RT-6 — Day-one research-to-runtime architecture guardrails (card evidence, hypothesis, provenance, PSI, compile manifests)

day_one_wave1_compiled_card_authority.description: All launch-active Wave 1 card subsystems must use compiled card evidence with resolving manifests; no total_bilirubin in artefacts; no legacy hard-coded activation.

day_one_compiled_hypothesis_promotion.description: signal_vitamin_d_low uses runtime-promoted compiled path with summary_template; single-frame only.

day_one_package_provenance_classificatio.description: All 186 packages classified; no unknown_requires_review; inferred provenance not written as explicit manifest source_spec_id.

day_one_psi_runtime_isolation.description: PSI loader must not be imported on launch-critical Intelligence Core paths.

day_one_no_runtime_investigation_spec_re.description: Launch-critical runtime modules must not read raw investigation specs.

day_one_frontend_render_only.description: Wave1SubsystemEvidenceSection filters internal source traces; no marker-role inference helpers.

day_one_compile_manifest_integrity.description: Launch compile manifests: compile_run_id equals compile_id; no pending_inventory_refresh hashes.
